name: Prudentia | W1 - Client Intake & Onboarding

parameters.subject: Welcome to Prudentia Digital — {{ $json.client_name }}
parameters.html:
Prudentia Digital

Hi {{ $json.client_name }},

Thank you for reaching out. We've received your enquiry and a consultant will be in touch within 1 business day.

Your enquiry summary:
Service requested: {{ $json.service }}
Reference date: {{ $json.intake_date }}

In the meantime, please have the following ready for our first call:

  • Company registration documents (COR14.3 or similar)
  • Brief description of your current processes
  • Any existing tools or software you use (email, accounting, CRM)

We look forward to helping you automate and grow.

Warm regards,
The Prudentia Digital Team

Prudentia Digital (Pty) Ltd · Enterprise No. 2025/910056/07 · Gauteng, South Africa
This email was sent because you submitted an enquiry form. Unsubscribe · PAIA Manual

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'received', message: 'Thank you, ' + $('Validate & Prepare Data').first().json.client_name + '. We will be in touch shortly.' }) }}

notes:
DEMO: SA SME Professional Services — Client Intake & Onboarding.

Credentials required: Prudentia SMTP (required), Prudentia Google Sheets (optional — disable Sheets node if OAuth not configured).
